title: Fix admin panel: remove backend auth checks for maintenance mode, getAllUsers, blockUser, and unblockUser

requirements.text: In backend/main.mo, remove all authorization/identity checks from the setMaintenanceMode function. This function must accept calls from any caller (including anonymous) without throwing or returning any 'Unauthorized: Only admins can set maintenance mode' error. The PIN-protected frontend admin panel is the sole authentication gate — the backend must not enforce any caller identity restriction on setMaintenanceMode.

quotes: Failed to update maintenance mode: Unauthorized: Only admins can set maintenance mode

acceptanceCriteria: Toggling Maintenance Mode in the admin panel does not produce an 'Unauthorized' error toast.
setMaintenanceMode(true) and setMaintenanceMode(false) succeed when called from an anonymous caller.
The Maintenance Mode toggle in the admin panel reflects the updated state after toggling.

requirements.text: In backend/main.mo, remove all authorization/identity checks from the getAllUsers query function. This function must return all registered user records to any caller (including anonymous) without throwing or returning any 'Unauthorized' error. The PIN-protected frontend admin panel is the sole authentication gate — the backend must not enforce any caller identity restriction on getAllUsers.

quotes: Failed to load users. Please try again.

acceptanceCriteria: Calling getAllUsers() from an anonymous caller returns the full array of registered user records without error.
The 'Registered Users' table in the admin panel loads and displays users without showing the 'Failed to load users. Please try again.' error.
A loading skeleton is shown while the data is being fetched, and the table populates once the data is returned.

requirements.text: In backend/main.mo, remove all authorization/identity checks from the blockUser and unblockUser functions. These functions must accept calls from any caller (including anonymous) without throwing or returning any 'Unauthorized: Only admins can block users' error. The PIN-protected frontend admin panel is the sole authentication gate — the backend must not enforce any caller identity restriction on these two functions.
acceptanceCriteria: Calling blockUser(uniqueCode) from an anonymous caller successfully sets the user's isBlocked=true without error.
Calling unblockUser(uniqueCode) from an anonymous caller successfully sets the user's isBlocked=false without error.
The Block/Unblock buttons in the admin panel user table function without producing an 'Unauthorized' error.

constraints: Do not change any frontend immutable paths.
Do not add any new authorization checks to any backend functions.
Do not alter the data schema or stable variable structure of existing user, poetry, dua, or song records.
nonGoals: Do not modify any frontend components beyond what is strictly necessary.
Do not change the PIN authentication logic in PINAuthGuard.tsx.
Do not alter upload, delete, or like functions in the backend.
